entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2020 and listed by independent exchange references as registered in the British Virgin Islands, currently operating spot and derivatives services under the Ourbit brand.
entity.notes: Independent exchange profiles consistently report a 2020 establishment year and British Virgin Islands registration, superseding the earlier 2023 Singapore seed values. The current official site and terms verify the operating brand but do not clearly identify the contracting legal entity, so confidence remains medium.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2023 and still operating under the Ourbit brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2020 and listed by independent exchange references as registered in the British Virgin Islands, currently operating spot and derivatives services under the Ourbit brand.
changes.notes: Independent exchange profiles consistently report a 2020 establishment year and British Virgin Islands registration, superseding the earlier 2023 Singapore seed values. The current official site and terms verify the operating brand but do not clearly identify the contracting legal entity, so confidence remains medium.

events.title: Ourbit was established in 2020
events.description: Ourbit was established in 2020 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange associated with the British Virgin Islands in independent exchange references.
events.notes: The reviewed references establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker. The operating legal entity remains unresolved.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Ourbit
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile records a 2020 establishment year, British Virgin Islands incorporation code, and Tortola address.

evidence.title: Ourbit market reference
evidence.notes: Independent exchange-data profile corroborates the 2020 establishment year and British Virgin Islands registration.

evidence.title: Ourbit terms and user agreement
evidence.notes: Current official terms verify the Ourbit platform relationship but do not clearly disclose a named contracting legal entity in the reviewed public text.

evidence.title: Ourbit official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Ourbit identity and active spot and derivatives platform.
